channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Go! Go! Mister Chickums launches April 2
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Xbox Series

Cooperative side-scrolling arcade game dated.

Cooperative side-scrolling arcade game Go! Go! Mister Chickums will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC via Steam on April 2, developer com8com1 Software announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via com8com1 Software:

About

Oh no! That sneaky Grabbo has stolen all of Mr. Chickums’ precious eggs! This misdeed cannot remain unpunished: Get out there and help the poor chick to regain his rightful property and give the culprit a well-deserved spanking!

And if you ever get stuck, invite your best friend to play the role of Fritz, Mr. Chickum’s BFF, to assist you in the hunt for the lost eggs!

Classic Arcade Action

Go! Go! Mister Chickums is a fun, classic single-screen platformer, inspired by arcade hits of the 80s. The game can be played either in single-player mode, or in local couch cooperative play with two players simultaneously.

So Much to Do, So Little Time

Jump and run through 100 lovingly designed screens and collect the stolen eggs before the clock runs out. Collect countless bonus items and take advantage of a variety of secret bonus mechanics to ensure you always have enough extra lives up your sleeve. Finish off the numerous enemies with their very own challenges and tactics and then kick the evil Grabbo’s bottom to save the day!

Key Features

  • Quite some features for such a small chick!
  • Classically inspired single-screen platform action.
  • Hours of fun in solo or two-player couch cooperative mode.
  • 100 challenging levels, each with a unique design.
  • A large variety of different enemies with unique behaviors.
  • Countless secret bonus mechanics.
  • Lots of Achievements to unlock.
  • Global leaderboards (PC-version only).
  • Gamepad support with rumble effects.
  • …and an amazing original soundtrack by Zane Little!

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/go-go-mister-chickums-launches-april-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: The Midnight Walk coming to Switch 2 on March 26
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Currently available for PlayStation 5 and PC.

Publisher Fast Travel Games and developer MoonHood will release dark fantasy first-person adventure game The Midnight Walk for Switch 2 on March 26 for $29.99, the companies announced.

The Midnight Walk first launched for PlayStation 5 with PlayStation VR 2 support, as well as for PC via Steam with virtual reality headset support on May 8, 2025.

Here is an overview of the Switch 2 version, via Fast Travel Games:

About

From the lonely flame of the lost lantern creature, Potboy, to the drooling snarl of monsters eager to devour its flame, The Midnight Walk is painstakingly handcrafted with real-life clay and animated in a stop-motion style. Survive and outsmart these monsters as you experience five tales of fire and darkness, featuring an incredible cast of odd characters. Players can look forward to witnessing each and every surreal detail in this twisted world as they experience the game in handheld mode on their Nintendo Switch 2.

Key Features

  • An Unforgettable Narrative Adventure – As The Burnt One, join Potboy and journey along The Midnight Walk, meeting an eclectic cast of friends and monsters on the way.
  • A Handcrafted World Built In Clay – Everything you see, from landscapes to enemies, was handcrafted and then scanned into the game for a truly artistic experience.
  • Play It Your Way on Nintendo Switch 2 – Experience The Midnight Walk at home or on the go with Nintendo Switch 2, bringing its atmospheric journey and distinctive visual style to both handheld and docked play.

Watch a new trailer below.

Switch 2 Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/the-midnight-walk-coming-to-switch-2-on-march-26
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Minishoot’ Adventures now available for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Xbox One, and Switch
item.content:encoded:
Publisher IndieArk and developer SoulGame have released twin-stick shooter Minishoot’ Adventures for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Xbox One, and Switch for $15.99. It is also available via Game Pass.

Minishoot’ Adventures first launched for PC via Steam on April 2, 2024. The PC version is also now available via Microsoft Store.

Here is an overview of the game, via IndieArk:

About

Fly into a charming handcrafted world and go on an adventure that mixes up open exploration with crispy twin-stick shooter action. Fight your way from the shiny overworld to the deepest caves, improve your ship and overcome the dungeons’ bosses to rescue your friends!

The Unchosen Has Returned…

His minions have emerged from the underworld, your village has been destroyed, and all your friends are now trapped in corrupted crystal… Embark on a journey to save the world in this bullet-filled adventure, born from our desire to mix the joy of open-ended exploration with a top-down shooter‘s juicy game feel.

Key Features

  • Engage With Tight Combat – Take control of a swift and responsive spaceship, and shoot your way through handcrafted encounters supported by a crystal clear esthetic and crispy game feel. Overcome bosses in intense Bullet Hell battles, with difficulty options for both newcomers and veterans.
  • Venture on Your Own – Plunge into an entirely handcrafted world built with many interconnections to explore on your own. Lush caverns, ancient temples and sunken cities await you with their unique treasures, challenges and secrets.
  • Reclaim the Stolen Powers – Finding the Primordial Powers will improve your combat and exploration abilities while also opening up the map bit by bit as you unlock new paths and reveal shortcuts.
  • Improve Your Ship – Upgrade your ship by leveling up, finding various items and buying equipment. Don’t forget to rescue your adorable friends; each of them will help you in their own way!
  • A Game Made for You – Whether you like chill exploration or hardcore Bullet Hell, we got you covered with three difficulty modes, aiming assistance, auto fire and more accessibility options.

Watch a new trailer below.

Consoles Launch Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/minishoot-adventures-now-available-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-xbox-one-and-switch
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Schrodinger’s Call adds Switch version, launches May 28
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch

Spirit adventure game dated.

Spirit adventure game Schrodinger’s Call will launch for Switch and PC via Steam on May 28, publisher Shueisha Games and developer Acrobatic Chirimenjako announced. The Switch version is newly announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

I am Mary. The last person in the world you’ll ever talk to. Schrodinger’s Call is an adventure game that uses a mysterious phone to connect with souls who cannot die. The main character, Mary, wakes up in a strange room with no memory. The player, along with the bewildered Mary, will save souls.

In a world devoid of human life, you awaken as Mary, the last ear to listen, the last voice to speak.

Forsaken souls seek your help over numerous calls, in a desperate attempt to regain the feelings they’ve lost.

You are Mary, the last voice they hear, unraveling lost souls with just a telephone.

Souls bound with strong regrets suffer somewhere between the lands of the living and the dead, desperately waiting for someone willing to listen. Will you be that ear and voice?

How to Play

Choose the words you want to speak to the souls who cannot die and the actions you want to take to save them and advance the story.

Calling various souls and gathering information is the key to moving forward.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/schrodingers-call-adds-switch-version-launches-may-28
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Unrailed! 2: Back on Track launches in May for Switch 2, Switch, and PC, later in 2026 for PS5
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Currently in Early Access for PC.

Chaotic cooperative railroad construction game Unrailed! 2: Back on Track will leave Early Access and launch for Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam in May, followed by PlayStation 5 later in 2026, developer Indoor Astronaut announced. A Switch demo is available now.

Unrailed! 2: Back on Track first launched in Early Access for PC on November 7, 2024.

Here are the latest details:

Upon arrival, fans can look forward to both native Nintendo Switch™ 2 and Nintendo Switch editions of Unrailed! 2: Back on Track alongside the 1.0 PC update in May 2026, with a PlayStation 5 release also due later this year.

To celebrate today’s announcements, a new playable demo is now available on Nintendo Switch, giving players a chance to jump in and experience the fun. Players can dive into the first biome of the game and attempt to overcome the boss encounter within, all while being able to enjoy local multiplayer for up to four players on a single Nintendo Switch device.

Upon the game’s full release in May, alongside local multiplayer, the Nintendo Switch 2 version will also support GameShare, allowing players to enjoy Unrailed! 2: Back on Track in even more ways on a compatible Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch device. Players can look forward to more information about GameShare and how to play together closer to release.

Unrailed! 2: Back on Track is a fast-paced cooperative multiplayer game where players must work together to keep their train moving across procedurally generated worlds. Up to four players can work together to gather resources and lay tracks and keep their constantly moving locomotive from derailing as it pushes through ever-changing landscapes. Featuring unlockable upgrades, six unique biomes, community-made maps and an all new eight-player Versus Mode, Unrailed! 2: Back on Track is the ultimate multiplayer mayhem for train aficionados and first-time passengers alike.

Watch a new trailer below.

Consoles Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/unrailed-2-back-on-track-launches-in-may-for-switch-2-switch-and-pc-later-in-2026-for-ps5
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
